overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character navigates under a large circular overpass with red lighting, crosses a street intersection, and continues through commercial and industrial urban corridors with passing vehicles and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with construction storage

events.description: approaching crosswalk and slowing slightly before crossing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily on the concrete sidewalk under the overpass, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket and red backpack walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: large curved elevated highway with red neon lighting underneath
tall metal shelving units with blue construction tarps and materials
weathered gray concrete pavement with red painted curb
metal fence separating sidewalk from street with barbed wire top

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive circular overpass illuminated by red neon lights, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket. The environment features industrial scaffolding on the right and a chain-link fence on the left, with the concrete sidewalk leading toward a distant crosswalk.

events.description: beginning to cross the street at the marked crosswalk
reaching the opposite sidewalk and entering the main commercial street

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt street at the marked crosswalk, moving from one sidewalk to the other

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan with headlights on approaching the intersection

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on building facade
small building with red illuminated signage reading Almunecar

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the crosswalk and crosses the open intersection, with a black futuristic car approaching from the right. Digital billboards become visible in the distance as the character reaches the opposite sidewalk, leaving the overpass behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boulevard with digital signage and palm trees

events.description: futuristic silver sports car with illuminated accents passes by on the left
slight turn to the right as the sidewalk curves along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk past digital billboards and storefronts with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: silver sports car with red neon underglow and FREE text on side

entered.detail: dark building with illuminated windows and ground-floor storefronts
massive vertical digital billboard with colorful advertisements
tall palm trees lining the street median
row of cyberpunk-style vehicles parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a commercial boulevard lined with palm trees and parked futuristic vehicles. Large digital billboards illuminate the scene with neon colors as a silver sports car passes by. The environment transitions from the intersection into a more defined commercial corridor with storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering darker industrial corridor with green fluorescent tube lighting on left wall
passing by pedestrians on the sidewalk in the narrower section

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrower industrial corridor with walls on both sides, passing under overhead structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall dark concrete wall with horizontal green fluorescent lighting fixtures
wall covered in white and blue graffiti tags and street art
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street
long green-lit fixtures mounted on the industrial wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, narrower industrial corridor with high concrete walls on both sides. Green fluorescent lights illuminate the left wall while graffiti covers the right. The street becomes more enclosed with an overhead pedestrian bridge visible in the distance, creating a more intimate urban canyon atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city that transitions from a massive industrial overpass into a narrow, enclosed urban canyon. It begins beneath a circular structure illuminated by red neon lights, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket past industrial scaffolding and chain-link fences. As the character steps onto a crosswalk and crosses an open intersection, the red glow of the overpass fades, giving way to the bright colors of distant digital billboards and the movement of futuristic cars. The scene then expands into a commercial boulevard lined with palm trees and parked vehicles, where silver sports cars glide past vibrant storefronts. Finally, the open boulevard narrows into a darker industrial corridor with high concrete walls, shifting the lighting to green fluorescent hues and graffiti-covered surfaces beneath a distant pedestrian bridge.
